programme.title: M3Gan 2.0
programme.desc: Your killer bestie is back! Armed with wild upgrades and her same iconic attitude, M3GAN faces off against an android who threatens her beloved Cady.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: A sheltered chameleon with an identity crisis finds himself in a town plagued by bandits and must play the hero to protect it.

programme.title: M3Gan 2.0
programme.desc: Your killer bestie is back! Armed with wild upgrades and her same iconic attitude, M3GAN faces off against an android who threatens her beloved Cady.

programme.title: Rango

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: A sheltered chameleon with an identity crisis finds himself in a town plagued by bandits and must play the hero to protect it.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Parrot
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Parrot. It turns out that Parrot has been left a secret treasure map by his great grandfather.

programme.title: Mister Stinker
programme.desc: When Goliath gets childishly enamored of a ventriloquist dummy that Simon has wired for sound, Team Alien believe they have him under their control - until a malfunction makes the dummy receive random radio broadcasts.

programme.title: Electromagnetic Attraction
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an electromagnet using a nail, a battery and some electrical wire. The electricity passing through the wire creates an invisible force called a magnetic field, making the nail work like a magnet. He uses it to pick up paper clips from the table.

programme.title: Sensational Senses!
programme.desc: Eric is blindfolded and has to figure out what a mystery object is using his other four senses – hearing, taste, touch and smell. He learns that although most animals have the same senses people do, they use them differently.

programme.title: Crusty Bogies!
programme.desc: How are bogies made? With the help of a supersized nose, the doctors make their own! We follow Dr Ronx on a busy hospital shift and Gladiator Dynamite kicks off a foot Body Battle!

programme.title: Kite Shenanigans
programme.desc: Eric builds a new kite. He makes sure it is symmetrical – both sides are exactly the same – as that helps kites fly and stay balanced in the air. He learns that there are lots of different types of kites but they all need the wind to fly.

programme.title: Hopes and Dreams
programme.desc: The Icicles have made it to the World Synchro Championships and are heading to Canada. After a season of flawless performances, can the girls pull off their Bollywood routine? The end of season Gala is near, but preparations aren't running as smoothly as everyone hoped.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part II
programme.desc: Our heroes prepare for a sleepover in the HQ, but it seems impossible to divide the space, so they each have a separate bedroom. Alim knows of places where people feel more comfortable sleeping together in the same room. Everyone is soon in Japan for a new adventure.

programme.title: Crazy Catalysts
programme.desc: What is a catalyst? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of chemical engineering. Have hands-on fun by producing your own cheese, and get to know Ryong Ryoo, who discovered a rock trapping water inside it can serve as catalyst in petrochemicals.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Suspicious Circles
programme.desc: When crop circles begin appearing in Ayrton Park, Alex suspects visitors from the fourth dimension, but Addison begins sleuthing in search of a different explanation.

programme.title: Doki Goes Batty
programme.desc: Fico wants Anabella to help him create a comic book about a bat superhero! But Anabella needs to see a real bat to draw one. Doki is nervous to go on this expedition. He's heard that bats drink your blood and tangle in your hair. Why shouldn't he be afraid of bats?

programme.title: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: The kids endure public humiliation performing the worst play of all time for their classmates and family. While in between performances, the gang gains a new perspective on history and decides to put a new spin on an old story.

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Utah adventure: White water rafting near Salt Lake City, bobsled racing at Utah Olympic Park, fearless rappelling in Moab, and off-the-grid dinosaur excavation. A week of thrilling escapades with Nicole and local teens in the great state of Utah!

programme.title: The Baltic Sea Anomaly
programme.desc: Ant finds a mysterious box. But a swarm of rabidly voracious “things” emerge, chasing him!

programme.title: Troubadours and Minstrels
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, listening to music for entertainment is a much-appreciated pastime. Singers and musicians of that era travel round Europe singing their poetry. Famous minstrel Howler is a huge hit at a fiery banquet in his lordship's court.

programme.title: Everything We've Waited For
programme.desc: It's Amelie and Phoebe's turn to head to the Artistic British Championships, and for the first time, they will be competing as seniors. Phoebe is showing a new move on the uneven bars, and Amelie is performing her new floor routine.

programme.title: Burpee and Keas Balloon Adventure
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts solve the problem of finding out far things by using a balloon-camera to take an aerial photo.

programme.title: Sensational Senses!
programme.desc: Eric is blindfolded and has to figure out what a mystery object is using his other four senses – hearing, taste, touch and smell. He learns that although most animals have the same senses people do, they use them differently.

programme.title: Troubadours and Minstrels
programme.desc: In the Middle Ages, listening to music for entertainment is a much-appreciated pastime. Singers and musicians of that era travel round Europe singing their poetry. Famous minstrel Howler is a huge hit at a fiery banquet in his lordship's court.

programme.title: Electromagnetic Attraction
programme.desc: Eric learns how to make an electromagnet using a nail, a battery and some electrical wire. The electricity passing through the wire creates an invisible force called a magnetic field, making the nail work like a magnet. He uses it to pick up paper clips from the table.

programme.title: E1 - What? Moon Over The Ruined Castle?
programme.desc: Makoto and Shiki stop in Orbit, where they meets Lana and Eto. They seek help against thieves threatening their village.

programme.desc: Without Hinata, Kageyama and Tsukishima, Karasuno High School is having a practice match with Tokonami High School.

programme.desc: The training camp will end soon. Hinata wants to tell Hyakuzawa from Kadokawa High who has lesser experience something.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. programme.title: Executive Decision
programme.desc: In a chillingly prescient story, 400 terrified passengers face death on a plane hijacked by terrorists. In a daring rescue attempt, an elite military unit boards the plane ... but as they hurtle toward Washington, D.C., the president must decide whether to destroy the plane or allow the heroes time to overpower the terrorists.

programme.desc: The Fast And The Furious is pure faced paced adrenaline-fuelled car action. A rookie cop goes undercover, posing as a racing team member to investigate a series of hijackings.

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

E9 - Ribbon Fall
programme.desc: The Ribbon Sisters invite Sarah and Duck to their favourite seasonal event in the park.

programme.title: E6 - Penguins Live In Igloos
programme.desc: Rain, hail, sunshine, and making snow giraffes! The animals chat about everything they love about their favourite seasons.

programme.title: E32 - Tradies
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E37 - The Traffic Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels begin a trip to the lake, but get stuck in a traffic jam!

programme.title: E2 - Hey Quacky!
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: E51 - Ilulissat, Greenland
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch has travelled to Ilulissat in Greenland to show his teddy, Cuddles, the sights. But Cuddles ends up getting stuck in the snow!

programme.title: E26 - Kiwi
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Kiwi performing Do the Kiwi Dance - if he manages to find someone to interview him first.

programme.title: E25 - Coconut
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Coconut getting his moment in the limelight with his sea shanty Oh, the Big Waves - if he manages to overcome a little stage fright.

programme.title: E36 - Toy Aisle Trouble
programme.desc: Evil Pea takes all the toys in the supermarket for herself and the Cobs to play with. Supertato climbs a big wall of boxes to try and get the toys back.

programme.title: E12 - Socks
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'socks' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see lots of different socks - summer socks, cosy socks, toes-y socks and even super socks!

programme.title: E35 - Smoochy Kiss
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

programme.title: E2 - The Face Painting Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels are looking for Duggee but can't find him. Instead, they find someone who looks like Enid, only much too big. Duggee has painted his face to look like Enid!

programme.title: E34 - The Dump
programme.desc: On a trip to the Dump, Dad claims he's the best at everything. But Bluey discovers that Dad's throwing out her old drawing and questions if he really is the best Dad in the world.

programme.title: E37 - Mr Monkeyjocks
programme.desc: Dad thinks the kids have too many toys and suggests a chuck out. To save their beloved Mr Monkeyjocks from getting the chop, Bluey and Bingo must prove he is special.

programme.title: E1 - Bedroom
programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E22 - Andy And The Common Octopus
programme.desc: Andy blasts off in his safari-sub to the coast of South Africa in search of an octopus.

programme.title: E3 - Gloves
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.

programme.title: E9 - The Tadpole Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has made a beautiful rock pool. The Squirrels spot the strangest things - dots with tails, wriggling around. What on earth are they? They are baby frogs - tadpoles!

programme.title: E20 - Tower Bridge, London
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is visiting London and spots the perfect souvenir hat. But he's run out of pocket money, so he decides to earn some as a tour guide.

programme.desc: Chilli and Bandit transform the old nursery into a new bedroom for Bluey. In the process, Bluey and Bingo amicably divide their belongings, but get absorbed by trading items and swapping notes at bedtime. Ultimately, when Bluey misses her sister, she asks to return to her old room.

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E22 - Andy And The Common Octopus
programme.desc: Andy blasts off in his safari-sub to the coast of South Africa in search of an octopus.

programme.title: E3 - Gloves
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie play a fun game of 'Wavey Wavey Snap' using some giant, silly gloves.

programme.title: E9 - The Tadpole Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has made a beautiful rock pool. The Squirrels spot the strangest things - dots with tails, wriggling around. What on earth are they? They are baby frogs - tadpoles!

programme.title: E20 - Tower Bridge, London
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is visiting London and spots the perfect souvenir hat. But he's run out of pocket money, so he decides to earn some as a tour guide.

programme.title: E9 - Ribbon Fall
programme.desc: The Ribbon Sisters invite Sarah and Duck to their favourite seasonal event in the park.

programme.title: E6 - Penguins Live In Igloos
programme.desc: Rain, hail, sunshine, and making snow giraffes! The animals chat about everything they love about their favourite seasons.

programme.title: E32 - Tradies
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo hide under the house and spy on two mysterious tradies working in the backyard, wondering what they're up to.

programme.title: E33 - Granny Mobile
programme.desc: Muffin is playing Grouchy Granny at a garage sale, making Dad push her on an old mobility scooter, but when a real Grouchy Granny wants to buy it, Muffin won't budge.

programme.title: E37 - The Traffic Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels begin a trip to the lake, but get stuck in a traffic jam!

programme.title: E2 - Hey Quacky!
programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.title: E51 - Ilulissat, Greenland
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch has travelled to Ilulissat in Greenland to show his teddy, Cuddles, the sights. But Cuddles ends up getting stuck in the snow!

programme.title: E26 - Kiwi
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Kiwi performing Do the Kiwi Dance - if he manages to find someone to interview him first.

programme.title: E25 - Coconut
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Coconut getting his moment in the limelight with his sea shanty Oh, the Big Waves - if he manages to overcome a little stage fright.

programme.title: E36 - Toy Aisle Trouble
programme.desc: Evil Pea takes all the toys in the supermarket for herself and the Cobs to play with. Supertato climbs a big wall of boxes to try and get the toys back.

programme.title: E3 - Pongberry
programme.desc: Messy has to deliver the giant pongberry to the Pongberry Pie Festival before it goes off and releases a terrible smell in OKIDO City!

programme.title: E19 - Joist Hoist
programme.desc: There's a girder out of place on Swoppiton Bridge, and unless Nori can fix it, that bridge is coming down! Luckily, Mojo's got the tops, and Bo's got the skills to help get it done.

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: E15 - Go Jetter Or No Jetter?
programme.desc: Foz starts to think his team doesn't need him anymore. Can Tala convince him he still has what it takes to be a Go Jetter, or will he follow Glitch down a different path?

programme.title: E38 - Double Babysitter
programme.desc: When Uncle Rad and Frisky accidentally turn up to babysit Bluey and Bingo on the same night, they have to work together to make Bluey feel better about babysitter put-downs.

programme.title: E2 - Obstacle Course
programme.desc: Chilli sets up an obstacle course in the backyard, but Bluey is disheartened when Bandit turns it into a race and beats her. After cheating in a rematch, Bluey discovers the importance of training in order to improve her skills.

programme.title: E3 - Promises
programme.desc: Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: E11 - The Pottery Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is having a lovely cup of tea in his favourite cup when Roly surprises him with a very loud peek-a-boo! It is so loud that Duggee jumps and drops his cup which shatters into pieces.

programme.desc: When it is time for Tortoise to hibernate, Sarah and Duck help him find a quiet place.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want Dad all to themselves and will not let Mum have a smoochy kiss. They try to hide him all around the house, but Mum is desperate to spend a little romance time with her husband.

Baogu Produces -Humor Research Institute
programme.desc: Hong Kong comedies from the 1980's and 1990's had been widely popular and many of them are still considered as classics among the genre. In this episode, the “Humor Research Institute” has invited veteran filmmakers Chan Hing Kai, Ho Miu Ki and Jack Ng to talk about their comedy-creating experience and introduce how fascinating comedies are written.

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Dojo and May are a loving couple. Because Dojo has a brain tumor and needs 1 million baht for the operation, they decide to rob a money exchange store. Unluckily, the couple with 10 unfortunate patrons of the money exchange center are held hostages by 3 professional robbers on the same day. It is a robbery inside another robbery as well as some secrets among these people will be revealed. What could possibly happen when these people are trapped in the store with no way to escape?

programme.title: HSBC BWF World Tour 2026 YONEX Swiss Open -Final Men's Singles
HSBC BWF World Tour 2026 YONEX All England Open Badminton Championships -Final Men's Doubles
E3
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: House Of Lies
programme.desc: House of Lies is an intense, family-centered drama about two mothers who face off against each other. Shaped by painful pasts, they clash in a fierce battle marked by betrayal, hidden family secrets, and a fight for survival.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.desc: It features two families who compete to name the most popular answers to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes

programme.title: The Future Of Farming
programme.desc: From agri-influencers to AI in cowsheds and autonomous tractors: Modern technologies are transforming agriculture worldwide. Machines are increasingly handling physically demanding tasks, both in barns and in fields.

programme.title: *Smiles And Kisses You* - In Love With An Ai-Powered Doll
programme.desc: Chris lives in North Carolina (USA) with his girlfriend Mimi, a life-size sex doll. He communicates with her using an AI app. A clear-eyed, fascinating look at AI and its social consequences.

programme.title: Stumbling Stones - Lest We Forget
programme.desc: ‘Stolpersteine', or ‘stumbling stones' placed in the pavement commemorate the victims of Nazism. The squares are made of brass and measure 10cm x 10cm. More than 100,000 of these memorial plaques have been laid in over 30 countries.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: E165
programme.desc: Phoenix Satellite TV creates a brand-new Greater Bay Area magazine-style column 'GBA Discovery' with a total duration of 26 minutes. Phoenix reporters visited the Greater Bay Area in person and discovered the latest and most interesting events, people, and achievements in the Greater Bay Area. The column is divided into three sections: hotspots in the Bay Area, people in the Bay Area, and coordinates in the Bay Area.

programme.title: E1 - Body Language
programme.desc: Join researchers as they study how animals communicate. Find out how wolves use their body language to unite the pack and maintain a sophisticated social structure, and see the astounding number of gestures chimps use to communicate.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E1 - Body Language
programme.desc: Join researchers as they study how animals communicate. Find out how wolves use their body language to unite the pack and maintain a sophisticated social structure, and see the astounding number of gestures chimps use to communicate.

programme.title: E3 - Water Worlds
programme.desc: Wade into wetlands, where trees and water meet to nurture new life. Dive into an underwater forest that protects young fur seals, visit a mangrove sanctuary where a curious band of aquatic misfits hides out, and meet some real-life swamp monsters.

programme.title: E3 - Walking with a Pangolin
programme.desc: Crush a busy day with the team as they release rehabbed pythons, teach a pangolin how to hunt, and round up a troop of vervet monkeys. Search for a missing bird of prey with Dr. Charlotte, while Dr. Amanda helps a bushpig savaged by poachers’ dogs.

programme.title: E4 - Tsiba's New Mum
programme.desc: Tackle an emergency when Dr. Amanda removes a sable antelope’s tracking collar, and see the animal-care team help a flea-riddled baby vervet monkey find a new mom. Free two orphaned serval cats and follow 20 yellow baboons into their new enclosure.

programme.title: E2 - Rumble in the Jungle
programme.desc: Tune into the natural world and explore frequencies beyond human hearing, like the gentle hum of giraffes in the evening, or creatures who use song to claim territory on a seemingly silent coral reef.

programme.title: E4 - The Karst Caves
programme.desc: Explore the stunning caves of Khammouane province in Laos. These natural wonders, squeezed between the Mekong River and the Annamite Range, are home to part-time and full-time residents, including bats, geckos, frogs, and giant centipedes.

programme.title: E14 - Jewellery By Tournaire/Lobster/Victoria Wilmotte/Tailoring
programme.desc: An in-depth look at an extraordinary jeweller: the story of Tournaire. All about eating lobster. A sculptural style with a hint of the industrial: an immersive visit to Victoria Wilmotte's studio. suit or oversized suit, shirt and tie: the tailored look is riding high.

programme.title: E28 - In Fougeres (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Fougeres, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in gastronomy and in the town's castle.

programme.title: E30 - La Rioja/Irun/Paella
programme.desc: On the agenda: discovering the heritage of the La Rioja region in Spain; a visit to Irun in the Basque Country, between historical remains and an ecological park; a recipe for duck breast paella.

programme.title: E2 - Trawlers In Peril
programme.desc: An immersive trip aboard the Breton trawler ''Le Magellan''. Ten days to the rhythm of a net that needs to be raised every 4 hours, followed by sorting, gutting and storing the fish in the hold. Ten days alongside this chain gang of the seas and their worries.

programme.title: E28 - In Fougeres (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Fougeres, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in gastronomy and in the town's castle.

programme.title: E13 - Alphonse Maitrepierre/Redfield & Dattner
programme.desc: Taking inspiration from the problems of his time, fashion designer Alphonse Maitrepierre creates clothes that are resolutely optimistic. Walls decorated by Redfield & Dattner, delightfully poetic.

programme.title: E30 - La Rioja/Irun/Paella

programme.title: E9 - Ardeche: 20,000 Leagues Under The Caves
programme.desc: Loic Ballet delves into the underground of Ardeche. Underground, you can sleep in a guest room and even taste bottles aged in the unique atmosphere of the Saint-Marcel Cave.

programme.title: E7 - Transformation Of An Old Mill Into An Eco-Friendly Guesthouse
programme.desc: In Herve, two sisters have transformed an 18th-century mill into a large, modern, and eco-friendly guesthouse: Rives 903. Also: Marin Montagut's chic country universe; how to reduce the use of fossil energy in homes; installing wallpaper and a wooden frame.

programme.desc: An immersive trip aboard the Breton trawler ''Le Magellan''. Ten days to the rhythm of a net that needs to be raised every 4 hours, followed by sorting, gutting and storing the fish in the hold. Ten days alongside this chain gang of the seas and their worries.

programme.title: E7 - Transformation Of An Old Mill Into An Eco-Friendly Guesthouse
programme.desc: In Herve, two sisters have transformed an 18th-century mill into a large, modern, and eco-friendly guesthouse: Rives 903. Also: Marin Montagut's chic country universe; how to reduce the use of fossil energy in homes; installing wallpaper and a wooden frame.

programme.title: E2 - The Biggest, Craziest Disasters!
programme.desc: Join Digley & Dazey as they face the biggest, craziest disasters! First, a big thunderstorm hits while the crew is working, & they have to rescue Scout after she gets trapped down a hole! Then, while working on a railway bridge, an earthquake causes it to almost fall apart, & the team must fix it before a train crosses! From escaping an avalanche they accidentally caused on a mountain to helping a baby lion that has escaped from the zoo, it's a day of big disasters!

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Fun & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Mia & Max for a big day of fun & learning! First, they go on a lovely little train ride with Tootson & their special friend Twinkle to learn all about shapes. Then, they hop on the Big Red Bus with Daddy, moving their hands like wheels going 'round & wipers going 'swish'! The learning continues as they have a musical drumming session with saucepans, play a game of 'What's In The Bag?' & learn about the world around them while singing & dancing.

programme.title: E2 - A Day of Cody's Favorite Things!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a day filled with all his favorite things! First, Cody gets to live out his dino dreams as he dons a dinosaur costume & pretends to be a monster attacking a toy bridge. The fun continues at school, where he starts playing a guitar & his classmates join in to form their very own rock band! Cody also shows his caring side as he & his friends encounter a lost baby duckling & lead the way to help it find the perfect home.

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E2 - The Biggest, Craziest Disasters!
programme.desc: Join Digley & Dazey as they face the biggest, craziest disasters! First, a big thunderstorm hits while the crew is working, & they have to rescue Scout after she gets trapped down a hole! Then, while working on a railway bridge, an earthquake causes it to almost fall apart, & the team must fix it before a train crosses! From escaping an avalanche they accidentally caused on a mountain to helping a baby lion that has escaped from the zoo, it's a day of big disasters!

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues with Grandma Gecko!
programme.desc: Grandma Gecko is here to help with some epic rescues! The action starts when Weasel's accelerator gets stuck & he can't stop driving! Grandma Gecko & Gecko hop on a motorbike for a high-speed chase to save him. Then, when lots of vehicles get flat tires from nails on the road, Gecko feels the pressure & calls his Grandma to help him speedily change all the tires. From building a wind turbine to saving Blue, Grandma can do it all!

programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: E1 - 「極挑團」乘坐18小時火車勇闖漠河
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E8 - 吳昕探班潘瑋柏
programme.desc: 三對明星情侶：內地演員鄭愷與圈外女友程曉玥，台灣歌手潘瑋柏搭檔內地女主持吳昕，台灣演員明道搭檔內地女演員王鷗；還有素人情侶加入，一起修煉愛情，傳遞正能量。

programme.title: E51 - All Hail Lutetia!
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Temps Present:2025-2026
programme.desc: ''Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: E5 - For The Prosecution
programme.desc: At the appeal court, assisted by Maxime, Jeanne defends a doctor accused of murder. On the opposite side, a heavyweight from the police force and against whom she holds an enduring grudge. Elodie is assaulted in the street. The prime suspect is none other than one of Nadia's clients.

programme.title: Temps Present:2025-2026
programme.desc: ''Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: E16 - Nadia Ounais (Tunisia)
programme.desc: Born in Tunisia, Nadia Ounais has been passionate about diving and oceanography since childhood. After a brilliant career in biology and oceanology, she takes over the direction of the Oceanographic Institute of Monaco. Deeply attached to her native country, she participated in the renovation of the Salammbo aquarium.

programme.title: E63
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Slam:2026
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: E13 - The Soap
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: E23 - Forests: The New Green Gold Of Occitanie
programme.desc: The timber industry is a fast-growing sector; the forest is a natural resource that attracts investors. But by seeking to make it profitable, do we risk altering it? How can we turn it into wealth without sacrificing it?

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: Point Of No Return
programme.desc: After police detective Lau is ambushed and killed, his best friend Pitt vows to get the killer. A series of investigation follows. Pitt finally finds an eyewitness to the killing - Fat Goose who is persuaded to testify against the killer Lam Man Fu. Lam Man Fu chases and attacks Pitt and Fat Goose. Finally, Pitt arrests him but Superintendent Keung frees Lam Man Fu and removes Pitt from the case. Then Lam Man Fu firebombs Fat Goose's residence. Fat Goose moves into Pitt's home and strikes a fast friendship with Angel, Pitt's reporter sister...

programme.title: The Magnificent Butcher
programme.desc: Lam sai-wing is the mischievous student of Wong Fei-hung. His eagerness to help others often lands himself in some precarious situations. He mistakenly befriends the only son of Master Kao from the Five Dragons School who then frames him for the murder of his God sister. Master Kao upon hearing his God daughter and his only son's death seeks Wing to avenger their cruel death...

programme.title: E62 - Welcome To Atlantis/Intermediate Photography/Independent Study: Mass Appeal/Advanced
programme.desc: The gang arrives in Atlantis hoping that Mr. Mollusk can restore color to Box and the ocean.

programme.title: E103 - Clown College/Charm School's Out/Beach Heads/Bridge Out/Ben 24hrs
programme.desc: While tailgating at a State U. homecoming football game, Ben teams up with Grandpa Max's old college buddies to keep the crazy clown Zombozo from robbing the stadium blind at halftime.

programme.title: E106 - Totally Trolling, Much?
programme.desc: Fights are breaking out all over Singapore as strange creatures with hairy feet cause trouble and ‘troll’ people. The Spies are sure their friendship won’t be affected but when it is, Mandy comes to the rescue- and the villain is linked to a past enemy.

programme.title: E23 - Jurassic Bean/Caring Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean goes in search of wildlife but he isn’t expecting to see anything prehistoric!

programme.title: E148 - Pardon The Garden/ Put The Cat Out: Flat On The Door/ Downward Duck/Lesson Plan 9 Fro
programme.desc: Petunia Pig wants to garden, but all she grows is trouble! Sylvester is a-door-able. Yoga is relaxing – unless Daffy is your instructor.

programme.title: E74 - The Romantic/The Uploads/The Wicked/The Origins - Pt 1/The Origins - Pt 2
programme.desc: After Gumball convinces himself that Penny doesn't love him as much as she used to, he decides to put together a romantic quest to remind her of all the good times they've had together. But Gumball's romantic gesture backfires, landing Penny - and maybe their relationship - in serious peril.

programme.title: E74 - The Romantic/The Uploads/The Wicked/The Origins - Pt 1/The Origins - Pt 2

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.title: Na Umra Ki Seema Ho
programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

E2 - Bond, Terry Bond
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be testing the effectiveness of driving a vehicle with fully automatic machine guns mounted to the car! Just like 007 did with his Aston Martin DB5.

programme.title: E1 - 101
programme.desc: Today on Million Dollar House Hunt we meet our house hunters Gill and Paul who are searching for a million dollar property in Benowa Waters on the Gold Coast

programme.title: E1 - Giants on the Move
programme.desc: Something is moving through Germany: machines weighing tons on wheels. In Bavaria, huge mobile cranes lift entire bridges in the middle of motorway traffic. In North Rhine-Westphalia, a heavy transport vehicle rolls through narrow villages. In Augsburg, the steel of a crane bends under 10-ton loads. Crane work with millimetre precision, overcoming obstacles on the route and constant time pressure demand the highest concentration and nerves of steel from the transport experts.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 講述一位懷抱著成為名作家夢想的志願生，雖然父親期望他成為像「尹東柱」這樣的劃時代詩人而取名，但現實是只有一身債務的作家志願生陸東柱，和來歷不明、有著特殊能力的少年姜山超越時間的界限一起尋找真相並創造奇蹟的過程。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 劇情講述一個少女的失蹤交織著無數的謊言和慾望，牽涉其中的七個人遭遇重大事件後發生的故事。這七個人都會為了個人私慾背叛，出賣他人，過著充滿謊言的生活。​

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Angrezi Medium
programme.desc: Though Champak initially disapproves, he eventually does everything in his power while going through a series of hilarious mishaps to fulfil his daughter's dream of going to London to study further. Release Year: 2020 Director: Homi Adajania Awards: Nominated in Filmfare Awards for Best DialogueBhavesh Mandalia, Gaurav Shukla, Vinay Chhawal and Sara Bodinar
